caption: A man with light brown hair and a dark blue shirt appears in a small video overlay in the bottom-left corner of a screen displaying a sports game management interface. He is positioned in front of a white wall with a Christmas tree visible to his left. The main screen shows a team "LINEUP" menu with various player cards featuring football players in uniforms. Navigation options at the top include "OFFENSE," "DEFENSE," "SPECIAL TEAMS," "SPECIALISTS," "STRATEGY," and "VISUALS." Numerical values are visible in the top right, including "173,037," "14,659," and "2,343,543." At the bottom of the screen, prompts such as "BEST LINEUP," "HELP," and "BACK" are listed. As the scene progresses, the man transitions from a neutral expression to a wide, smiling laugh, while the game interface remains static across the frames.
